_comment: Container-relative MCP config for the zoe-omnigent container (audit fix #4). The code-intel binaries are bind-mounted READ-ONLY at their identical host paths by docker-compose.module.yml, so /home/zoe/.local/bin/... resolves verbatim inside the container. The repo is mounted at /workspace (NOT /home/zoe/assistant), so serena's --project points there. Copy this to /workspace/.mcp.json inside the container if the host's root .mcp.json (which uses --project /home/zoe/assistant) is not present or not desired; otherwise the mounted root .mcp.json already resolves.
